comment: P5 responds readily to P2’s questions, laughs lightly, offers personal details about work and children, and ends by calling it a fun study. These are clear signals of a warm, positive experience with P2, above small talk but not highly animated or effusive.

The transcript captures P5’s contributions but includes overlapping segments, partial words, and some duplicated or fragmented phrases. While understandable with effort, it is clearly imperfect and somewhat noisy, meriting a slightly below-average but not unusable rating.
